RoseSorter v.1.2

DSA Caucus Sorter

What is this?

RoseSorter is a political quiz that attempts to assign you to a DSA Caucus or Tendency (an unofficial ideological grouping within DSA) that matches your views, utilizing a flowchart model. This test will sort you into one of 18 DSA caucuses.

I don't like my result!

Most caucuses are internally diverse and strategically flexible. Your result reflects the tendency whose general platform most closely matched your answers. Reading the points of unity for a DSA caucus, or better yet organizing within DSA and getting to know organizers on the ground will do a better job of helping you find your political home within DSA than any online quiz.

Special Thanks

This project was made possible due to the initial concept of flow-chart style ideological sorter I discovered with Ideosorter, the guides to political tendencies in DSA created by the Libertarian Socialist Caucus of DSA, and The Rose Garden DSA Substack, the insights into the resolution votes made by NPC candidates that I found within Aaron's 2025 National DSA Convention HQ, and the many caucused friends that helped me navigate their caucus' strategic alignment.

Disclaimers

This sorter reflects the general positions and tendencies within DSA as of 2024–2026. Most caucuses are at least somewhat strategically and ideologically diverse. The vast majority of DSA members are not members of any caucus, and this quiz is not intended to inflate the role that caucuses play within the internal politics of DSA. There is far more that unites us than divides us. Get organized, join DSA. This is not an official DSA tool, nor is it sanctioned by DSA. This tool has been made by @socfemme on twitter.

About

This sorter was made by @socfemme. Corrections and feedback are welcome via Twitter.
